arts.ttl: Watford FC training ground dome made permanent after appeal win
arts.sum: Watford FC has been granted permission to make its temporary London Colney training dome permanent at appeal.

arts.ttl: Which two Watford managers conceded less in first 10 home games than Tom?
arts.sum: Cleverley has conceded just five goals in his first 10 home games, a record only bettered by two of his predecessors...
A cartoonist whose work was a much-loved feature of the Watford Observer’s coverage of events on and off the pitch at Vicarage Road died 15 years ago today.

arts.ttl: Watford more attacking playing current shape than 4-3-3 says Cleverley
arts.sum: The Hornets head coach says the formation his team are playing means they attack with five players rather than three.
